title: Use GetContainer instead of LookupContainer for full ID
body: All IDs in libpod are stored as a full container ID. We can get a container by full ID faster with GetContainer (which directly retrieves) than LookupContainer (which finds a match, then retrieves). No reason to use Lookup when we have full IDs present and available.
